fields.label: Hospital / Facility Name
fields.notes: Advisory field. Token-level fuzzy match after canonicalization. Weight lowered from V1 (0.20→0.10) — entity resolution is too noisy to carry high weight.

fields.label: Admission Date
fields.notes: ISO 8601 after normalization. ±1 day tolerance. If transcript year is absent, compare month+day only.

fields.label: Discharge Date
fields.notes: Optional in MVP — only verified if present in both sources.

fields.label: Primary Diagnosis
fields.notes: LLM equivalence judge. Must distinguish disease from procedure (appendicitis ≠ appendectomy). Entity type (DISEASE/PROCEDURE) from extraction used as guardrail.

fields.label: Total Billed Amount
fields.notes: Compare as integers in same currency (INR). ±5% tolerance. Bill is authoritative.

fields.label: Duration of Admission (days)
fields.notes: Derived from admission/discharge dates if not stated explicitly.
